What I offer

Clear pricing. Honest timelines. Production-quality work at every price point.

Risk-Free

Starter Websites

From £1003–5 days

A professional, fast-loading website for businesses that need an online presence without a large budget. Built to the same standard as everything else — just scoped smaller.

Best for

  • Takeaways & restaurants
  • Trades & contractors
  • Personal trainers
  • Local services
  • Small companies
Get a quote

What's included

  • Fast single-page website
  • Mobile responsive design
  • Contact form
  • SEO fundamentals
  • Domain & hosting guidance
Most Popular

Business Websites

£600 – £800+2–4 weeks

A proper multi-page Next.js website built for performance, conversion, and growth. Every business that takes its online presence seriously should be building at this level.

Best for

  • Growing businesses
  • Professional services
  • Agencies & studios
  • Companies needing a CMS
Get a quote

What's included

  • Next.js multi-page site
  • CMS / content editing
  • Netlify Forms
  • Google Analytics
  • Full SEO setup
  • 95+ Lighthouse performance
  • Mobile-first, accessible

Optional add-ons

  • Admin dashboard£200–£400
  • Stripe payments£200–£400
  • Booking systemPOA
  • AI featuresPOA
For New Businesses

Internet Presence

Bespoke1–2 weeks

For businesses starting from scratch or with a fragmented online presence. I set up and optimise every digital touchpoint so customers can find you wherever they look.

Best for

  • Brand new businesses
  • Companies with no online presence
  • Businesses being rebranded
Get a quote

What's included

  • Google Business Profile setup
  • Social media account setup
  • SEO foundations
  • AI search visibility
  • Online branding consistency
Enterprise

Custom Software

Scoped per projectAgreed per scope

Best for

  • SaaS startups
  • Businesses needing internal tools
  • Companies requiring AI or Stripe
  • Complex workflow automation
